title: Savoury Peanut Beans & Sesame Eggs
summary: A cosy, nourishing bowl that packs a punch in terms of flavour. The peanut butter, eggs and butter beans provide loads of protein to keep you fuller for longer. Batch-cook a load of the beans and slaw and thank yourself later.

ingredients.label: 2 Tbsp Natural Dark Roast Peanut Butter
ingredients.name: Dark Roast Peanut Butter

method.description: Trim and finely mince the lemongrass and scotch bonnet. Finely grate the garlic and ginger.

Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a large frying pan set over a medium-high heat. Add the lemongrass, ginger, garlic, scotch bonnet and tomato purée and fry for 3-4 mins until the tomato purée has darkened. Pour in the water, butter beans and their liquid and stir the peanut butter through. Bring the mixture to the boil, then lower the heat to low and leave to simmer until ready to serve. Before serving, taste and season with salt and pepper. Add a splash of more water if needed.

Meanwhile, bring a saucepan full of water to the boil. Once boiling, gently drop the eggs in and cook for 7 mins. Transfer to a bowl of ice water for a couple of minutes, before peeling them. Add the sesame onto a plate and gently roll the eggs in them until covered.
For the slaw, finely shred the cabbage and pick the mint leaves. Toss into a bowl with the vinegar, oil and sesame seeds. Season with salt and set aside.
To serve, spoon the beans into bowls. Halve the eggs and place on top of the beans along with some minty cabbage slaw.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
